description_long: A small bunch of bananas is shown, consisting of four bananas still attached at the stem and one separated banana lying nearby. The bananas have a yellow peel with numerous brown spots and some minor blemishes, indicating natural aging. The stems are short and slightly brown, with the detached banana showing a pale greenish-yellow stem. The surface of the bananas is smooth but slightly dimpled, with a matte finish and some visible bruising. The bananas are slightly curved, with the group forming a gentle arc and the single banana displaying a pronounced bend. No commercial stickers or labels are visible on any of the bananas.
description: A bunch of five yellow bananas, four attached and one separated, with brown spots and a smooth, slightly dimpled surface.
description_view_0: A cluster of four bananas with a single banana lying in front, showing the yellow peels with brown spots and the attached stems.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the cluster of four bananas and the separated banana, with visible brown speckling and stem ends.
description_view_2: Side view showing the single banana in the foreground and the attached bunch behind, emphasizing the curvature and smooth surface.
description_view_3: Rear view of the bunch, focusing on the rounded ends of the bananas and the separated banana to the left.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana peels are intact with visible brown spots and minor blemishes, but no significant tears, splits, or signs of peeling. The surface appears smooth with some dimpling and bruising.
